overview: A full-featured Hotel and Restaurant Management System with real-time order management, kitchen display system, table tracking, smart billing with GST, quick-order fast picks, and sales reports. Designed for fast, smooth restaurant operations from order to bill.
features: Menu management with Veg/Non-Veg/Drinks/Snacks categories and half/full portion pricing
Real-time table status board showing Free/Occupied tables
Order placement for Dine-in, Takeaway, and Online with item selection
Kitchen Order Ticket (KOT) screen with Pending/Cooking/Ready workflow
Smart billing with auto-calculated totals, optional GST (CGST/SGST split), and service charge
Quick-order fast-pick buttons for most common items
Restaurant reports: total orders, total sales, and top-selling items
